title: Recurring QIF spec alignment audit
description: Run QIF quality-intent/risk/loss audits against docs/specs/v0.1 at each stage boundary and before closing major tasks; update the QIF report, STATUS handoff, and task triage notes with pass/defer/fix decisions.
triage_notes: QIF cadence applied after TASK-005 public API/render changes: docs/aof/QIF-SPEC-CHECK-2026-06-27.md updated with external src, src_fetch_failed, and diagnostics target/panel progress. Full sample verification added: npm run verify:pattern-samples covers 576 built 2D renders, and tools/pattern-browser-verify.html covers 54 live browser SVG/canvas renders. Keep open; run again before closing major tasks and include pattern samples in recurring audits.
